finding_results.notes: Rebalanced the anomaly revisits so each passage now turns on a different escalation: system-wide scope, proxy deniability, institutional suppression, proof of authored history, and Mira's deliberate hold decision.
finding_results.summary: The chapter no longer keeps re-proving the impossible body in the same terms; each later beat advances pressure and consequence instead.

summary: Revised chapter 1 to preserve the original discovery-to-hold spine while tightening repeated explanation passes into a clearer escalation of deniability, suppression, theft, and irreversible choice.
